_comment: Absolute ceilings for every maintained function node. Inherited f50950b1 entries stay at exact measured size; later growth requires a specific owner reason.

sys-stats-fn.reason: filtered restartPending status (Option C Slice 1b), including explicit blocked/malformed/unreadable restartPending states, deduplicated fan-probe warnings, and a capped, hotplug-pruned context map (+4862)

prune-sync-outbox.reason: outbox pruning overhaul with eviction-index awareness (1.A5)

history-api-router-fn.reason: history API card-data source field passthrough (1.A6, +150); Field Journal Task 12: fieldJournalUxEnabled feature flag, visible touched-node catches, rejecting DB-close wrapper (+312); AgroLink Phase A exposes scoped_access (+75); AgroLink Phase B zone/gateway/workspace scope enforcement (+2596)

sync-pending-split.reason: Field Journal Task 11: preserve the trusted pending-command envelope alongside legacy flat routing fields; sync-failclosed-20260719: explicit isHttpSuccess integer-2xx gate replaces the truthy/negative statusCode check so status 0, missing, string '200', and non-2xx never advance lastPendingCommandPollSuccessAt (+118)

command-dedupe-dispatch.reason: Field Journal Task 10: shared command-ledger replay; PR #141 hardening: guarded osiLib loading and protected-type routing keep generic commands independent from optional journal hooks

cmd-type-registry.reason: 1.C: expanded command-type registry from 8 to 33 types

reject-indefinite-open.reason: 1.C: expanded COMMAND_TYPES_FALLBACK to match 33-type registry; sync-failclosed-20260719: durable REJECTED_PERMANENT ack builder (rejectionAck) replaces the silent null drop for bare OPEN, unknown command types, and OPEN_FOR_DURATION without a duration (+632); PR #149 review: second output routes terminal rejection ACKs directly to the durable queue (+40)

write-strega-expectation.reason: AgroLink Phase C reasserts fresh device scope at enqueue, fails closed, and records user originators.

5f0d2b7e9b9b1b3a.reason: AgroLink Phase C disables schedules at execution when a zone has no enabled scope holder.

dendro-compute-fn.reason: issue #10: INSERT OR REPLACE -> ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upserts bumping sync_version (dendrometer_daily + zone_daily_recommendations); PR #140 review finding: add sync_version to the three inline fallback CREATE TABLE statements (+104)

sim-dendro-fn-setup.reason: issue #10: sim INSERT OR REPLACE -> ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE upserts bumping sync_version

sync-init-fn.reason: issue #10 trigger rewrites pass NEW.sync_version + AU gates; issue #4 gatewaySql escape fix; issue #5 chameleon_enabled added to trg_sync_devices_outbox_au WHEN clause + payload; issue #16 (+420) boot rewrites of trg_dp_device_data_outbox_ai + trg_dp_chameleon_readings_outbox_ai regain the seed's WHEN-clause gateway-EUI resolvability guard (trigger-body parity adjudication, Pattern A)

sync-bootstrap-build.reason: issue #5: devices SELECT gains chameleon_enabled + 3 depth columns (+102); PR #140 review finding: dendroDaily/zoneRecommendations/zoneEnvironments SELECTs gain sync_version (+79); Field Journal Task 12 plus final review: fail-closed 12-table readiness, tuple-watermark manifest, rejecting DB-close wrapper in normal bootstrap (+4078); PR #141 hardening: object-only outbox payload parser and rollback propagation (+139); live identity restart sentinel (Option C Slice 1), including caught-error source marking and preservation (+1311)

sync-outbox-build.reason: retryable backoff: pending-events SELECT gains a last_retryable_failure_at/retry_count cooldown-exclusion clause (Task J); PR #141 hardening: object-only payload parser, rollback propagation, strict delivery mapping, and visible cleanup catches (+397 vs current origin/main); live identity restart sentinel (Option C Slice 1), including marked gateway-identity errors (+1200)

sync-pending-build.reason: live identity restart sentinel (Option C Slice 1), including marked gateway-identity errors

sync-outbox-mark.reason: sync stop-loss delivery consumer: fail-closed HTTP status/result validation, per-event terminal classification, duplicate/malformed/unrequested-result rejection, and bounded protocol errors (Plan 3 Tasks 1-2)

sync-force-build.reason: issue #5: devices SELECT gains chameleon_enabled + 3 depth columns (+102); PR #140 review finding: dendroDaily/zoneRecommendations/zoneEnvironments SELECTs gain sync_version (+79); retryable backoff: same cooldown-exclusion SELECT clause + retry_count/last_retryable_failure_at UPDATE as sync-outbox-mark (+280, Task J); Field Journal Tasks 11-12 plus final review: preserve trusted envelopes, fail-closed 12-table readiness, tuple-watermark manifest, rejecting DB-close wrapper, and exposeEmptyCatches over main's Task J catches (+4936); PR #141 hardening: object-only outbox payload parser, rollback propagation, and strict delivery mapping (+100); live identity restart sentinel (Option C Slice 1), including marked gateway-identity errors (+1200)

command-ack-build-batch.reason: live identity restart sentinel (Option C Slice 1); sync-failclosed-20260719: groups local command_ack_outbox rows by parsed commandId, collapses byte-identical canonical duplicates into one outgoing ACK with _localAckCorrelation, and withholds delivery with a token-free warning on conflicting rows (+1028)

command-ack-mark-delivered.reason: sync-failclosed-20260719: per-entry ACK result handling - only a single unambiguous ACKED+accepted result delivers a command_ack_outbox row; missing/duplicate/malformed entries, statusCode 0, non-200, and HTTP 500 leave the row pending with a bounded retry error (+1493); command-ack join fix: fixed the business-commandId -> outbox-row-id join (grouped results are now keyed by String(commandId) and resolved through msg._localAckCorrelation with a fallback to id-as-commandId when correlation is absent) so a non-numeric server commandId like 'cmd-900' no longer silently matches nothing (+1704)

work-request-status-apply.reason: sync-failclosed-20260719 idempotent-replay fix: SELECT applied_commands WHERE command_id=? guards a replay of the same commandId from re-UPDATE-ing improvement_requests, rebuilding and returning the original terminal ACK verbatim; a first-time APPLIED result also INSERTs the same 'initial' result_detail shape osi-command-ledger.queueCommandAck writes, so the downstream command-ack-queue-rest call reproduces the identical command_ack_outbox row via its persistReplayAck branch (+2089)

6b28e0d879808dd9.reason: LSN50 writer runtime recovery (2026-07-15 plan Task 3): awaits the asynchronous osi-device-writer contract, adds a fixed loader/manifest/identity/normalize/db-open/writer/db-close stage-code table (reportFailure) so every UC512 write failure reaches record-error-catch-uc512 with only a bounded message, and adds deferred-close handling that never claims a failed write succeeded (+938, temporary until the 14-day-or-500-uplink fallback cleanup threshold).

460e0bfd95f89e67.reason: LSN50 writer runtime recovery (2026-07-15 plan Task 3): awaits the asynchronous osi-device-writer contract, adds the LSN50_WRITER_DISABLE UCI kill-switch check, and adds the useFallback stage/code helper (normalizer_load/writer_load/manifest_load/normalize_run/db_open/writer_run) that routes every writer failure through output 2 into the observable fallback marker chain instead of silently dropping the message, plus deferred-close handling for a post-success DB_CLOSE_FAILED (+1596, temporary until the 14-day-or-500-uplink fallback cleanup threshold).

lsn50-fallback-marker-fn.reason: LSN50 writer runtime recovery (2026-07-15 plan Task 3): new node -- records an ingest_quarantine writer_fallback marker row (deveui, '__writer__', 'writer_fallback', stage) before every forced or automatic LSN50 legacy fallback insert, rejecting an unknown/missing stage. Temporary until the 14-day-or-500-uplink fallback cleanup threshold.

lsn50-fallback-evict-fn.reason: LSN50 writer runtime recovery (2026-07-15 plan Task 3): new node -- emits the writer's existing ingest_quarantine eviction cap (LIMIT 1000, matching osi-device-writer's QUARANTINE_CAP) ahead of the restored legacy insert. Temporary until the 14-day-or-500-uplink fallback cleanup threshold.

lsn50-sql-fn.reason: LSN50 writer runtime recovery (2026-07-15 plan Task 3): restored verbatim from historical commit cf68c5e8 (pre-cutover legacy 'Build SQL INSERT' node) as the tail of the observable fallback chain; commit e5852033 deleted this node 13m35s after cutover with no replacement fallback. Temporary until the 14-day-or-500-uplink fallback cleanup threshold.
